style.argument: Builds airtight chains of reasoning and waits for the flaw in yours.
style.combat: Precise and counter-focused: modest damage, devastating punishes.

special.name: The Syllogism
special.description: A three-part chain the opponent cannot step out of. Heavy damage if all three parts connect.

fighters.name: The Demagogue
fighters.tagline: The crowd is already with me.

style.argument: Sweeping claims delivered loud; feeds on momentum and applause.
style.combat: Heavy swings and forward pressure: huge damage, big openings.

special.name: Rally the Crowd
special.description: Whips the audience into a roar. The next heavy that lands carries the crowd's weight with it.

style.argument: Stacks observation on observation until the conclusion is unavoidable.
style.combat: Relentless jab pressure: chips you down and converts jabs into evidence combos.

special.name: Weight of Evidence
special.description: Drops the accumulated case all at once. Damage scales with hits landed since the last special.

style.argument: Reframes, redirects, and answers the question you should have asked.
style.combat: Mobile and slippery: interrupts, sidesteps, and makes whiffs expensive.

special.name: The Reframe
special.description: Flips the premise mid-exchange. Swaps positions with the opponent and steals the momentum of their last move.
